name: American Homes 4 Rent
business: American Homes 4 Rent is a Maryland REIT focused on developing, renovating, leasing and managing single-family homes as rental properties. As of December 31, 2025, it owned 61,479 single-family properties in select submarkets of metropolitan statistical areas across 24 states.
sellsTo: Households in select submarkets of metropolitan statistical areas within 24 states
Tenants who choose to rent single-family homes

exposures.sentence: We are focused on developing, renovating, leasing and managing single-family homes as rental properties.

If our confidential information is compromised or corrupted, including as a result of a cybersecurity incident, our business operations and reputation could be damaged, which could adversely affect our financial condition and operating results.

Information security risks have generally increased in recent years due to the rise in new technologies, such as artificial intelligence ( AI ), and the increased sophistication and activities of perpetrators of cyber-attacks.

catalysts.event: Board authorized new share repurchase program
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, the Company's board of trustees authorized a new share repurchase program to repurchase up to $500.0 million of outstanding Class A common shares and up to $250.0 million of outstanding preferred shares from time to time in the open market or in privately negotiated transactions.
